---Begin Environment---
SHELL=/bin/csh
UNAME_v=FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p5
UNAME_r=10.3-RELEASE-p5
BLOCKSIZE=K
MAIL=/var/mail/root
STATUS=1
OPSYS=FreeBSD
ARCH=amd64
SAVED_TERM=screen-256color
MASTERMNT=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/pkg-default/ref
UID=0
FORCE_PACKAGE=yes
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
_JAVA_VERSION_LIST_REGEXP=1.6\|1.7\|1.8\|1.6+\|1.7+\|1.8+
POUDRIERE_BUILD_TYPE=bulk
PKGNAME=aide-0.16
OSREL=10.3
_OSRELEASE=10.3-RELEASE-p5
PYTHONBASE=/usr/local
OLDPWD=/
PWD=/usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/pkg-default/ref/.p/pool
MASTERNAME=pkg-default
SCRIPTPREFIX=/usr/local/share/poudriere
_JAVA_VENDOR_LIST_REGEXP=openjdk\|oracle\|sun
USER=root
HOME=/root
POUDRIERE_VERSION=3.1.14
SCRIPTPATH=/usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh
CONFIGURE_MAX_CMD_LEN=262144
LIBEXECPREFIX=/usr/local/libexec/poudriere
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
PACKAGE_BUILDING=yes
_JAVA_OS_LIST_REGEXP=native\|linux
OSVERSION=1003000
---End Environment---

---Begin OPTIONS List---
---End OPTIONS List---

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--
--with-mhash  --with-zlib  --mandir=/usr/local/man  --with-config_file=/usr/local/etc/aide.conf --prefix=/usr/local ${_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS}
--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--CONFIGURE_ENV--
MAKE=gmake XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work TMPDIR="/tmp" SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SITE=/usr/ports/Templates/config.site lt_cv_sys_max_cmd_len=262144
--End CONFIGURE_ENV--

--MAKE_ENV--
XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/aide/work TMPDIR="/tmp" NO_PIE=yes WITHOUT_DEBUG_FILES=yes WITHOUT_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=yes SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  LIBDIR="/usr/lib"  CC="cc" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe  -I/usr/local/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing"  CPP="cpp" CPPFLAGS=""  LDFLAGS=" -lpthread -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector" LIBS=""  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing "  MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 444"  BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444"
--End MAKE_ENV--

--PLIST_SUB--
OSREL=10.3
PREFIX=%D
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
RESETPREFIX=/usr/local
PORTDOCS="@comment
"
PORTEXAMPLES="@comment
"
LIB32DIR=lib
DOCSDIR="share/doc/aide"
EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/aide"
DATADIR="share/aide"
WWWDIR="www/aide"
ETCDIR="etc/aide"
--End PLIST_SUB--

--SUB_LIST--
PREFIX=/usr/local
LOCALBASE=/usr/local
DATADIR=/usr/local/share/aide
DOCSDIR=/usr/local/share/doc/aide
EXAMPLESDIR=/usr/local/share/examples/aide
WWWDIR=/usr/local/www/aide
ETCDIR=/usr/local/etc/aide
--End SUB_LIST--

---Begin make.conf---
USE_PACKAGE_DEPENDS=yes
BATCH=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs
PORTSDIR=/usr/ports
PACKAGES=/packages
DISTDIR=/distfiles
#### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/pkg-make.conf ####
#DEFAULT_VERSIONS = mysql=10.1m
#PHP_DEFAULT = 7.0
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= php=70
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= mysql=10.1m

CPUTYPE? = native
MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER = 8

WITH_BDB_VER=5
OPTIONS_UNSET=CVS CTM GAMES GDB DOCS EXAMPLES HTML FORTRAN SHAREDOCS LPR SENDMAIL FLOPPY \
MISC KERBEROS LOCALES LINUX LIB32 X11 FONTCONFIG QT QT4 GTK GTK1 NETGRAPH IPFW CALENDAR \
GTK2 KDE KDE4 GUI VIDEO SOUND USB BLUETOOTH SAMBA TRACING CUPS DEBUG IPFILTER PPP WIRELESS \
HELP STATIC GNUTLS DBUS ALSA PULSEAUDIO DOCBOOK TESTS HTMLDOCS BONJOUR GSSAPI APIDOCS
